HomePage.title: Manual nutrition tracking in English and Hebrew.
HomePage.description: Create an account, manage a profile and manual targets, and add, edit, or delete daily diary entries in a direction-aware interface.

status.title: Current scope
status.body: Accounts, profile and manual targets, manual diary tracking, and read-only food search are implemented. Custom-food UI, diary food selection, barcode scanning, recipes, external ingestion, broader analytics, and production deployment remain unavailable.

signIn.title: Sign in
signIn.description: Sign in with email and password to manage your manual targets and diary entries.

signUp.title: Create account
signUp.description: Create an account with email and password for manual target and diary tracking.

status.ready: This form uses Supabase Auth. Profile, manual targets, and diary tracking are available after sign-in.
status.checkEmail: The account was created, but this app cannot complete email confirmation yet.

errors.authFailed: We could not complete that auth request. Check the details and try again.
errors.missingConfig: Supabase environment values are missing on this machine.
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.

Setup.label: Profile & targets
Setup.titleInitial: Complete your profile and manual targets.
Setup.subtitleInitial: Add the basics for this account. Targets are optional and can stay blank until you are ready to enter them manually.
Setup.subtitleEdit: Review your profile details and update any manual targets you want to manage yourself.

profile.displayNameHelp: This name is only for the app interface. Unit system remains metric in the current MVP.

targets.title: Manual daily targets
targets.description: Enter targets you chose yourself. Changes saved here apply from {date}, the current calendar date on this device. This app does not calculate calorie or nutrition targets.
targets.blankHelper: Blank means not set. Zero means an intentional value of 0.

status.idle: Save when the profile details are ready. Manual targets can be left blank.

retrievalError.title: Setup could not be loaded
retrievalError.body: We could not load your profile and target data. Nothing can be edited until the current values load successfully.

errors.generic: We could not save setup right now. Try again in a moment.
errors.unauthenticated: Sign in again before saving setup.
errors.validation: Check the highlighted fields and try again.
errors.displayNameTooLong: Display name must be 80 characters or fewer.
errors.invalidNumber: Enter a valid number or leave the field blank.
errors.invalidInteger: Calories must be a whole number.

bootstrap.setupTitle: Opening targets for your local date
bootstrap.status: Determining the current calendar date on this device...

manual.description: If automatic date detection is unavailable, choose the calendar date on this device and continue.
manual.label: Calendar date

errors.title: Choose a valid calendar date
errors.invalid: That calendar date does not exist or is outside the supported years 0001 through 9999.
errors.unsupported: Use the exact YYYY-MM-DD calendar-date format without a time or surrounding spaces.
errors.repeated: Only one calendar date may be supplied. Remove repeated date parameters and try again.

recovery.description: Choose a valid calendar date to continue. No diary or target data was loaded for the invalid request.

list.title: Diary entries
list.description: Manual entries for the selected date. Read-only food search is available separately; diary food selection, saved foods, charts, and analytics are still deferred.
list.empty: No diary entries for this date yet.
list.saveIdle: Update the fields you want to change.
list.saveError: Could not update entry. Check the fields and try again.
list.deleteError: We could not delete this entry. Try again.

totals.title: Daily totals
totals.description: Consumed totals from the manual entries loaded for this date.

targetProgress.title: Target progress
targetProgress.body: Compare manual diary totals for {date} with the target effective on that date.
targetProgress.emptyTitle: No target is effective for this date
targetProgress.emptyBody: Target progress appears after a manual calorie, protein, carbohydrate, or fat target is effective for the selected date.

form.title: Add manual entry
form.description: Add one food manually. Read-only search is available separately, but food selection and barcode scanning are not connected to the diary yet.

help.mealType: Choose where this entry belongs in the day.
help.foodName: Use any clear food name. Mixed Hebrew and English names are okay.
help.brandName: Add a brand only when it helps you recognize the item.
help.servingQuantity: Leave blank if the amount is not useful. Zero is saved as 0.
help.calories: Whole number only. Blank means not set; 0 is allowed.
help.protein: Grams. Blank means not set; 0 is allowed.
help.carbohydrates: Grams. Blank means not set; 0 is allowed.
help.fat: Grams. Blank means not set; 0 is allowed.

status.idle: Add a manual entry when the required fields are ready.

errors.database_error: We could not save or load diary entries right now.
errors.invalidInteger: Calories must be a whole number.
errors.invalidNumber: Enter a valid number or leave the field blank.
errors.unauthenticated: Sign in again before using the diary.
errors.validation: Check the highlighted fields and try again.

FoodSearch.label: Food catalog
FoodSearch.title: Search readable foods.
FoodSearch.description: Find public foods and your own custom foods by name, alias, or brand. Search is read-only and is not connected to the diary yet.

form.label: Food name, alias, or brand
form.help: Enter at least 2 characters. Search supports English, Hebrew, and mixed text.

initial.title: Start with a food search
initial.body: Enter a food name, known alias, or brand to view readable catalog entries.

tooShort.title: Add another character
tooShort.body: Food search starts at 2 normalized characters. No database search was run.

invalid.title: Check the search query
invalid.repeated: Only one search query may be supplied. Remove repeated q parameters and try again.
invalid.tooLong: Search queries must be 100 characters or fewer.

empty.title: No readable foods found
empty.body: Try another food name, alias, or brand. Private foods owned by other users are never included.

failure.title: Food search could not be loaded
failure.body: We could not search readable foods right now. No database details were exposed.

results.title: Search results ({count})
results.readOnly: Read-only result — diary selection and editing are not available in this phase.
results.limit: Up to 20 results are shown for each search.

today.label: Today workspace
today.title: Track a selected day.
today.description: Review the target effective for the selected date and add, edit, or delete manual diary entries with daily totals and target progress.
today.placeholderBody: Profile settings, effective-dated targets, diary entries, totals, and progress are stored for the signed-in account.
today.setupCalloutBody: Add profile details and optional manual targets before using the complete tracking loop.
today.targetEmptyTitle: No manual target is effective for this date
today.targetEmptyBody: Your profile is ready, but no target is effective for the selected diary date. Current target management uses this device's current calendar date.

profileRetrievalError.title: Profile status could not be loaded
profileRetrievalError.body: We could not load your profile right now. Diary content remains available, but the setup prompt is hidden until this read succeeds.

targetRetrievalError.title: Targets could not be loaded
targetRetrievalError.body: We could not load the target for this date. Diary content remains available, but target summary and progress are hidden until this read succeeds.

targetSummary.title: Manual daily targets
targetSummary.body: These values are effective on {date}. They are not calculated recommendations.
